verses.text: By night she seeks 'him whom my soul loveth' but cannot find him, until she rises and the watchmen meet her. Absence makes her seek the harder. When Christ withdraws His felt presence, the longing soul searches restlessly for Him.

By night she seeks 'him whom my soul loveth' but cannot find him, until she rises and the watchmen meet her. Absence makes her seek the harder. When Christ withdraws His felt presence, the longing soul searches restlessly for Him.

By night she seeks 'him whom my soul loveth' but cannot find him, until she rises and the watchmen meet her. Absence makes her seek the harder. When Christ withdraws His felt presence, the longing soul searches restlessly for Him.

Finding him, she holds him and 'would not let him go,' bringing him to her mother's house, and charges not to stir love untimely. Found love clings fast. The soul that has met Christ again holds Him close and will not lightly lose Him.

Finding him, she holds him and 'would not let him go,' bringing him to her mother's house, and charges not to stir love untimely. Found love clings fast. The soul that has met Christ again holds Him close and will not lightly lose Him.

Who is this coming from the wilderness like pillars of smoke, with Solomon's guarded bed and sixty mighty men? The bridegroom approaches in splendour and safety. So Christ comes to His own in glory, well able to keep them.

Who is this coming from the wilderness like pillars of smoke, with Solomon's guarded bed and sixty mighty men? The bridegroom approaches in splendour and safety. So Christ comes to His own in glory, well able to keep them.

Who is this coming from the wilderness like pillars of smoke, with Solomon's guarded bed and sixty mighty men? The bridegroom approaches in splendour and safety. So Christ comes to His own in glory, well able to keep them.

Solomon's chariot of Lebanon wood is described, and the daughters are called to behold the crowned king on his wedding day. The king is displayed in joy. The Church gazes on her royal Bridegroom in the day of His gladness.
